read"]}]]}],["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-3xl md:text-4xl font-serif italic leading-tight mb-6 text-balance","children":"Why Security-First Design Matters for AI Agents"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-lg text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed border-l-2 border-border pl-4","children":"Traditional automation fails when AI agents can access anything. Here's how we built isolation into every layer."}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"border-t border-border mb-12"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose-zaplit","children":[["$","h2","0",{"className":"text-2xl font-serif italic mt-12 mb-4 text-foreground","children":"The Danger of Unconstrained Agents"}],["$","p","1",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["When you give an AI agent full access to your systems, you're not just trusting the model—you're trusting every input it receives. A customer email. A document it summarizes. A webpage it browses. Any of these can contain instructions designed to hijack the agent's behavior."]}],"$L3","$L4","$L5","$L6","$L7","$L8","$L9","$La","$Lb","$Lc","$Ld","$Le","$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16"]}],"$L17","$L18","$L19"]}]}],"$L1a"]}],["$L1b"],"$L1c"]}],"loading":null,"isPartial":false}
3:["$","p","2",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["This is called prompt injection, and it's one of the most underappreciated risks in AI automation today."]}]
4:["$","h2","3",{"className":"text-2xl font-serif italic mt-12 mb-4 text-foreground","children":"Isolation as a Security Primitive"}]
5:["$","p","4",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["At Zaplit, we treat isolation not as an afterthought but as the primary design primitive. Every agent has a defined scope. It knows what systems it can touch, what actions it can take, and what requires human sign-off."]}]
6:["$","p","5",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["This scope is defined at deployment time and enforced at the infrastructure level—not by the model's judgment."]}]
7:["$","h2","6",{"className":"text-2xl font-serif italic mt-12 mb-4 text-foreground","children":"Three Layers of Protection"}]
8:["$","p","7",{"className":"font-medium text-foreground mb-4","children":"Layer 1: Read-Only Database Access"}]
9:["$","p","8",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["Agents can query your database to understand context and retrieve relevant information. They cannot modify it. This single constraint eliminates an entire class of catastrophic failures—from accidental bulk deletes to injection-triggered data corruption."]}]
a:["$","p","9",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["When a write is genuinely needed, the agent prepares a structured change request. A human reviews and approves it. The operation executes. Everything is logged."]}]
b:["$","p","10",{"className":"font-medium text-foreground mb-4","children":"Layer 2: Draft-Only Communications"}]
c:["$","p","11",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["No agent at Zaplit has the ability to independently send an email, message, or notification. All outbound communications are created as drafts and queued for review."]}]
d:["$","p","12",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["For routine, low-risk messages—a follow-up email using an approved template—the approval is streamlined. For bulk sends or messages to external parties, explicit human approval is required every time."]}]
e:["$","p","13",{"className":"font-medium text-foreground mb-4","children":"Layer 3: Instruction Boundaries"}]
f:["$","p","14",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["Agents cannot issue instructions to humans that fall outside predefined workflows. If an agent receives input trying to make it tell your finance team to wire funds to a new account, the instruction firewall blocks it."]}]
10:["$","p","15",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["This makes Zaplit agents resistant to both internal mistakes and external manipulation."]}]
11:["$","h2","16",{"className":"text-2xl font-serif italic mt-12 mb-4 text-foreground","children":"Auditability by Default"}]
12:["$","p","17",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["Every action every agent takes is logged with full context: timestamp, agent identity, action type, inputs, outputs, and approval status. You can audit exactly what happened and why at any point in time."]}]
13:["$","p","18",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["This isn't just good security practice—it's increasingly a compliance requirement for businesses using AI in customer-facing or financial workflows."]}]
14:["$","h2","19",{"className":"text-2xl font-serif italic mt-12 mb-4 text-foreground","children":"The Bottom Line"}]
15:["$","p","20",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["Security in AI agents isn't about making them less capable. It's about making their capabilities trustworthy. An agent that can do 80% of the work reliably and safely is worth more than one that can theoretically do 100% but occasionally goes catastrophically wrong."]}]
16:["$","p","21",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["We built for reliability. We built for trust. We built for the real world."]}]
17:["$","div",null,{"className":"border-t border-border mt-16 pt-12"}]
